raw.problem: Post-harvest loss is invisible because supply chains are opaque.
raw.why_now: Affordable IoT + UPI rails enable traceable logistics.
raw.success_scenario: If traceability becomes export-required, adoption is mandatory.

structured.tagline: Make post-harvest loss visible through traceable agri supply chains.
structured.problem: Post-harvest loss is invisible because supply chains are opaque.
structured.differentiator: Affordable IoT + UPI rails enable traceable logistics (team ex-Ninjakart).
structured.solution: Built SaaS + leased IoT devices for traceable post-harvest logistics.
structured.ask: Pilot partners for post-harvest traceability deployment.
